# HPD.ML.TimeSeries.StlDecomposition

- Package: `HPD-ML-TimeSeries` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.TimeSeries`
- Kind: `class`

STL (Seasonal-Trend decomposition using LOESS). Decomposes a time series into seasonal, trend, and residual components.
